# CheckboxCard

A card-style checkbox component for rich, selectable card interfaces. Composed of multiple sub-components for flexible content layout within the card.

## Import

```jsx
import {
  CheckboxCard,
  CheckboxCardControl,
  CheckboxCardLabel,
  CheckboxCardDescription,
  CheckboxCardIndicator,
  CheckboxCardHiddenInput,
  CheckboxCardContent,
  CheckboxCardAddon,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `CheckboxCard` | The root wrapper (renders `CheckboxCard.Root`). Manages checked state |
| `CheckboxCardControl` | The interactive card area |
| `CheckboxCardLabel` | The title/label text of the card |
| `CheckboxCardDescription` | A description below the label |
| `CheckboxCardIndicator` | The checkbox indicator (checkmark) |
| `CheckboxCardHiddenInput` | The hidden native input for form submission |
| `CheckboxCardContent` | Container for the label and description |
| `CheckboxCardAddon` | An optional addon section at the bottom of the card |

## CheckboxCard (Root) Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `variant` | `"subtle" \| "surface" \| "outline"` | `"outline"` | The visual variant of the card |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the card |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | - | The color palette for the selected state |
| `checked` | `boolean` | - | Controlled checked state |
| `defaultChecked` | `boolean` | - | Initial checked state for uncontrolled usage |
| `onCheckedChange` | `(details: { checked: boolean }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the checked state changes |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the card is disabled |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<CheckboxCard>
  <CheckboxCardHiddenInput />
  <CheckboxCardControl>
    <CheckboxCardContent>
      <CheckboxCardLabel>Premium Plan</CheckboxCardLabel>
      <CheckboxCardDescription>Access all features</CheckboxCardDescription>
    </CheckboxCardContent>
    <CheckboxCardIndicator />
  </CheckboxCardControl>
</CheckboxCard>
```

### With addon

```jsx
<CheckboxCard variant="surface">
  <CheckboxCardHiddenInput />
  <CheckboxCardControl>
    <CheckboxCardContent>
      <CheckboxCardLabel>Email notifications</CheckboxCardLabel>
      <CheckboxCardDescription>Receive updates via email</CheckboxCardDescription>
    </CheckboxCardContent>
    <CheckboxCardIndicator />
  </CheckboxCardControl>
  <CheckboxCardAddon>Recommended</CheckboxCardAddon>
</CheckboxCard>
```

### Multiple selection

```jsx
<Stack>
  {["Basic", "Pro", "Enterprise"].map((plan) => (
    <CheckboxCard key={plan} variant="outline">
      <CheckboxCardHiddenInput />
      <CheckboxCardControl>
        <CheckboxCardContent>
          <CheckboxCardLabel>{plan}</CheckboxCardLabel>
        </CheckboxCardContent>
        <CheckboxCardIndicator />
      </CheckboxCardControl>
    </CheckboxCard>
  ))}
</Stack>
```

### Sizes

```jsx
<CheckboxCard size="sm">...</CheckboxCard>
<CheckboxCard size="md">...</CheckboxCard>
<CheckboxCard size="lg">...</CheckboxCard>
```

## Features

- Card-style checkbox for rich selection interfaces
- Multiple visual variants: subtle, surface, and outline
- Compound component pattern for flexible content layout
- Hidden input for native form submission
- Supports addon section for supplementary content
- Each sub-component forwards refs to its underlying DOM element
